hero.subtitle: AI-powered suggestions for destinations you'll love, crafted for the modern wanderer.
hero.search_placeholder: Where do you want to go?

card1.title: Ho Chi Minh City
card1.desc: Explore the dynamic pace of life, bustling skyscrapers, and rich street food culture in Vietnam's largest metropolis.

card2.title: Hanoi Capital
card2.desc: A journey back in time with the ancient Hoan Kiem Lake, 36 bustling streets, and elegant traditional cuisine.

card3.title: Da Nang Coastal City
card3.desc: Experience unique architectural bridges, majestic Marble Mountains, and the stunning My Khe beach - one of the most attractive beaches on the planet.

ai.subtitle: Smart Assistant
ai.title: Tailored for your taste
ai.desc: Our AI learns from your preferences to curate the perfect escape.

card1.title: The Solo Adventurer's Path
card1.desc: Safety-focused, high-engagement solo itineraries in safe urban hubs.

card2.title: Eco-Conscious Escapes
card2.desc: Sustainable stays and low-carbon transport journeys through lush rainforests.

card1.title: The Art of Minimalist Packing: 10 Days in One Bag
card1.desc: Learn how to traverse the globe with only the essentials without sacrificing style or comfort.

card2.title: Hidden Tokyo: Beyond the Neon and Crowds
card2.desc: Discover the quiet temples and artisanal coffee shops tucked away in the world's busiest city.

about.hero_subtitle: SmartTravel is a practical project developed by a group of students. We built this platform to apply AI technology and programming knowledge to solve real-world problems in the tourism industry.

mission.title: Project Goals
mission.p1: During our studies, we realized that theoretical knowledge is most valuable when applied in practice. This project is our team's effort to connect classroom theory with modern technology.
mission.p2: The product integrates smart features like AI itinerary suggestions, user management, and location reviews. The system was comprehensively developed from Front-End to Back-End with high standards, focusing on optimization and user experience.
mission.p3: Although there is still room for improvement, SmartTravel is a memorable milestone and a stepping stone for us to go further on our path to becoming professional software engineers.

team.title: The Team
team.heading: The Faces Behind the Project
team.subtitle: Meet the 8 team members who worked hard day and night to complete this product.

du.desc: Passionate about creating seamless experiences with every click. Designs interfaces with the motto: Beautiful, intuitive, and bug-free.

dat.desc: Guiding the team through endless deadlines. Spends most of his time teaching AI to understand users better than coding.

duy.desc: The wizard behind the curtain, managing the entire backend architecture to ensure the app always runs lightning fast.

hien.desc: Addicted to CSS and smooth animations. Responsible for turning design ideas on paper into living, breathing UI.

hung.desc: Loves solving complex logic puzzles, transforming messy raw data into clean and stable APIs.

anh.desc: In love with numbers and charts. Discovers hidden patterns in massive datasets to recommend your perfect trip.

hieu.desc: The orchestrator of the team, perfectly balancing the developer's wild ideas with the actual requirements of the project.

nguyen.desc: The team's bug hunter, living by the motto that it's better to force devs to fix things locally than let a single bug reach the user.

cta.heading: Explore our results
cta.subtitle: Take a few minutes to try the app and see what we have built. We look forward to receiving your feedback!

header.label: Global Discovery

search_page.no_results_desc: Try entering a different keyword or check out the suggestions above.

aiconcierge.greeting: Hello! I am your AI Concierge. I can help you plan your next trip, find information, or just have a chat. How can I assist you today?
aiconcierge.user_msg_1: Suggest a 3-day itinerary in Da Lat this November. I want quiet places with beautiful architecture.
aiconcierge.bot_msg_1: Da Lat in November is wonderful with pink grass and wild sunflowers, and the air is perfectly chilly. Here's a "Slow & Artsy" itinerary for you:
aiconcierge.bento_1_desc: Explore **Bao Dai Palace III** and the French colonial villas on Tran Hung Dao street. In the afternoon, visit **Ana Mandara Villas** for tea.
aiconcierge.bento_2_desc: Morning visit to **Stop and Go Art Space**. Afternoon relaxation at hidden alley cafes like **Tung Coffee** or **Thong Oi**.
aiconcierge.bot_msg_2: I understand! That's a great idea. Would you like me to go into more detail for each location?
aiconcierge.delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete this conversation? Chat history will be permanently deleted.

footer.desc: Experience the world with "The Ethereal Explorer". Boundless, atmospheric landscapes waiting to be discovered.
